2604.05458.title: MA-IDS: Multi-Agent RAG Framework for IoT Network Intrusion Detection with an Experience Library
2604.05458.paper_summary: Network Intrusion Detection Systems (NIDS) face important limitations. Signature-based methods are effective for known attack patterns, but they struggle to detect zero-day attacks and often miss modified variants of previously known attacks, while many machine learning approaches offer limited interpretability. These challenges become even more severe in IoT environments because of resource constraints and heterogeneous protocols. To address these issues, we propose MA-IDS, a Multi-Agent Intrusion Detection System that combines Large Language Models (LLMs) with Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) for reasoning-driven intrusion detection. The proposed framework grounds LLM reasoning through a persistent, self-building Experience Library. Two specialized agents collaborate through a FAISS-based vector database: a Traffic Classification Agent that retrieves past error rules before each inference, and an Error Analysis Agent that converts misclassifications into human-readable detection rules stored for future retrieval, enabling continual learning through external knowledge accumulation, without modifying the underlying language model. Evaluated on NF-BoT-IoT and NF-ToN-IoT benchmark datasets, MA-IDS achieves Macro F1-Scores of 89.75% and 85.22%, improving over zero-shot baselines of 17% and 4.96% by more than 72 and 80 percentage points. These results are competitive with SVM while providing rule-level explanations for every classification decision, demonstrating that retrieval-augmented reasoning offers a principled path toward explainable, self-improving intrusion detection for IoT networks.
2604.05458.paper_summary_zh: 網路入侵偵測系統（NIDS）面臨重要的限制。基於簽名的方法對於已知攻擊模式有效，但它們在檢測零日攻擊時表現不佳，並且經常錯過已知攻擊的修改變體，而許多機器學習方法的可解釋性有限。由於資源限制和異構協議，這些挑戰在物聯網環境中變得更加嚴重。為了解決這些問題，我們提出了 MA-IDS，一種多代理入侵偵測系統，將大型語言模型（LLMs）與檢索增強生成（RAG）相結合，以進行基於推理的入侵偵測。所提出的框架通過持久的、自建的經驗庫來支持 LLM 的推理。兩個專門的代理通過基於 FAISS 的向量數據庫協作：一個流量分類代理在每次推理之前檢索過去的錯誤規則，另一個錯誤分析代理將錯誤分類轉換為可供人類理解的檢測規則，這些規則被存儲以便未來檢索，從而實現通過外部知識積累的持續學習，而無需修改底層的語言模型。在 NF-BoT-IoT 和 NF-ToN-IoT 基準數據集上進行評估，MA-IDS 的宏觀 F1 分數分別達到 89.75% 和 85.22%，相比於零樣本基準的 17% 和 4.96% 提高了超過 72 和 80 個百分點。這些結果與 SVM 競爭，並為每個分類決策提供規則級的解釋，展示了檢索增強推理為物聯網網絡提供了解釋性、自我改善的入侵偵測的原則性途徑。
2604.05458.author: Md Shamimul Islam et.al.
2604.05458.authors: Md Shamimul Islam, Luis G. Jaimes, Ayesha S. Dina
